title: Spring up
summary: “And from thence they went to Beer: that is the well whereof the LORD spake unto Moses, Gather the people together, and I will give them water. Then Israel sang this song, Spring up, O well; sing ye unto it:”Num 21:16-17  We normally approach anything to do with the children of Israel in the desert with Moses with a very critical attitude. Much of this perception is justified – they appeared to be quite ungrateful waiting at every turn to question God and Moses and revert to worshipping and longing for the gods and oppression of Egypt. However, in this study today, the children of Israel have to commend their behaviour and there is a powerful lesson for us to learn.
